title: A Mysterious Golden Orb Was Discovered Under the Sea. We Finally Know What It Is.
summary: The discovery of a bizarre golden object two miles under Alaskan waters flummoxed scientists, but a new study pins down the true nature of the “orb.”
reason: A marine biology curiosity with no meaningful connection to the framework's analytical concerns.

title: Some Connecticut Towing Companies Are Ignoring New Law Aimed at Helping Low-Income Residents
summary: The post Some Connecticut Towing Companies Are Ignoring New Law Aimed at Helping Low-Income Residents appeared first on ProPublica .
reason: Towing companies defying a consumer protection law for low-income residents is a concrete example of enclosure operating through extraction from precarious people, with the state's alibi (the new law) becoming visible as inadequate routing infrastructure.
angle: Use the alibi structure tool: the law functions as legitimating cover for a system that continues to extract, revealing that representational-level reform (passing a law) without routing-level change (enforcement architecture, power redistribution) leaves the extraction mechanism intact.

title: The Unmaking of Labour

summary: To quote the great philosopher Kermit the Frog, "It's not easy being green."
